summary: Small tooling cleanup in `tools/calcprogress/calcprogress.py`: removed a leading newline from the trophy/event progress printout so current `calcprogress` output matches the older tool output.

what_changed.description: In `exec_progress_callback`, changed the trophy/event status print from `print("\nYou have ...")` to `print("You have ...")`, removing the extra blank line before the status message.

smart_moves: Kept the fix minimal: one formatting character was removed with no changes to progress calculations or surrounding output.
Used old `calcprogress` behavior as the reference, preserving compatibility for users or scripts expecting the historical output shape.
decomp_lessons: For project tooling, output formatting can matter even when computed values are unchanged; match prior tool behavior when replacing or porting scripts.
Small formatting regressions in helper tools should be fixed narrowly to avoid perturbing unrelated decomp progress calculations.
searchable_terms: Code bytes to go for next trophy
follow_up_queries: Search for tooling PRs that restored old script output compatibility
